tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] x2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Bend her over, then I murk her[/tab]

Call Gunna if you want you a Birkin
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
"Oh, Baby, you be lyin' in your verses[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I be hearin', say you buyin' 'em purses"[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
I can't even lie, you ain't my type[/tab]

You ain't even all that fine in person
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
I can guarantee you if you my kind[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
She got every bag you can imagine[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Big house, I can really be braggin'[/tab]

Hundred thousand in my mouth like, "What's happenin'?"
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Not the big cheap teeth, that's embarrasin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
He ain't me, you can keep the comparisons[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
My bitch probably one of the baddest[/tab]

Good girl, turned her into a savage
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
Dispatch, got a problem in traffic[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We came through in matching G-Wagens[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Low-key, I've been keeping it classy[/tab]

Could be really out here doin' 'em nasty
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Niggas couldn't even see me in last year[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Just started and them niggas in last gear[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I ain't even try to and I passed 'em[/tab]

Giving looks, I contribute to fashion
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Drop a song, I be giving them captions[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Stand alone, not your regular rapper[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Brand new car is noisy, come through and it's roarin' (Skrrt)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
You ain't gotta worry, don't care about your boyfriend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  See me and get nervous, I damn near did it perfect[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Work hard and determine, it's safe to say I earned it, woah[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, none of you guys get fly as me, woah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Matter of fact, none of you guys get high as me, woah[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]F[/ch]
Post my drip up daily just so they can see, woah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Turn me up some more so my haters can hear it, woah (Yeah)[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                                                        [ch]F[/ch]
I put the dope in the back of the car and I tell 'em to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                                              [ch]Am[/ch]
She hit when she land, she bring me the bands, she back on the road[/tab]

She know how I get when I get in that mode
[tab]                                            [ch]F[/ch]
Ain't fuckin' with bitches, ain't buying no clothes[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Wanna do shows and make me some songs[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Make sure that other shit come in, get sold[/tab]

We fuck with the strippers 'cause we play with poles
[tab]                                        [ch]F[/ch]
We play with our money and not with our nose[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
I used to go to the West to get loads[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]
I just came back from the West with a trophy[/tab]

I'm on some more shit

She said she miss it and sendin' emojis
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
No time to kick it, I'm always in motion[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Can't say I miss you, I don't got emotions[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm on that back-when-I slept-on-the-floor shit[/tab]

I'm on that me-and-the-bro-kick-a-door shit
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
I'm on that back-when-I-stood-at-the-stove shit[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Ain't goin' broke, I'm just back on my old shit[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm takin' drugs, I don't know how to cope it[/tab]

I know one thing, I'm never gon' be hopeless
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
If you tell 'em what was said, you a rodent[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Drive the new Corvette like it's stolen, yeah[/tab]
